reasoning: Paul Biedermann's 200m freestyle long course world record (1:42.00), set in 2009 during the super-suit era, remains unbroken. As of late 2025, no swimmer has legitimately approached this time, with the closest recent effort being David Popovici's 1:42.97 in 2022. Additionally, the time window between October 2025 and January 2026 does not coincide with major long course international championships where peak performances are typically targeted, further reducing the odds of the record being broken. Therefore, it is highly likely the record will stand through January 24, 2026.
